compatibilityStatuses.description: Required conformance evidence is absent, incomplete, failing, or explicitly not claimable.
The React oracle exists, but no local Fast React dual-run comparison exists.
The local Fast React path is still a placeholder or unsupported facade.
Fast React was compared against React and the observed behavior mismatched.
Fast React matched the checked observation, but the broader compatibility claim remains false.
All required conformance gates are green and compatibility is explicitly claimable.

timingStatuses.description: No benchmark samples have been collected for this scenario.
Timing collection or reporting is blocked by non-green conformance evidence.
Timing data may be recorded for diagnosis, but cannot support a speed claim.
Implementations were timed, but compatibility evidence is not green, so the timing is diagnostic.
Compatibility and timing gates are both green, so timing may be compared without direction.
A comparable timing result is inside the configured noise band.
A comparable timing result shows Fast React slower for this exact scenario and lane.
A comparable timing result shows Fast React faster for this exact scenario and lane.

benchmarkReadinessStatuses.description: The benchmark milestone is represented in schema, but timing admission is blocked by non-green conformance evidence.
The benchmark milestone may collect diagnostic timing in a future runner, but cannot support a speed claim.
The benchmark milestone may collect comparable timing only after all required compatibility gates are green.
